pages.title: Salad Recipes – Healthy, Chicken, Vegan & Quick Ideas

pages.title: Mediterranean Chicken Salad
pages.description: Grilled chicken with olives, feta, cucumber, and lemon-herb dressing. A protein-rich lunch that tastes like sunshine.

pages.title: Avocado Quinoa Power Bowl
pages.description: Creamy avocado, fluffy quinoa, black beans, and lime. A high-protein vegan salad that keeps you full for hours.

pages.title: Greek Salad with Grilled Chicken
pages.description: Classic Greek salad topped with grilled chicken. Fresh, simple, and satisfying.

pages.title: Kale Caesar with Chicken
pages.description: Kale, romaine, and grilled chicken with a light Caesar-style dressing.

pages.title: Cucumber Tomato Weight Loss Salad
pages.description: Light, refreshing cucumber and tomato salad perfect for weight loss goals.

pages.title: Spicy Thai Chicken Salad
pages.description: Bold Thai flavors with shredded chicken, peanuts, and lime.

pages.title: Roasted Vegetable Vegan Bowl
pages.description: Roasted seasonal vegetables over greens with a tahini drizzle.

pages.title: Berry Spinach Salad with Feta
pages.description: Fresh spinach, strawberries, blueberries, and feta with a light balsamic glaze. Sweet, tangy, and nutritious.

pages.title: High-Protein Grilled Chicken Salad
pages.description: Grilled chicken over mixed greens with avocado, cherry tomatoes, and cucumber. A protein-packed meal with 38g protein per serving.

pages.title: Avocado Chickpea Healthy Salad
pages.description: Creamy avocado and boiled chickpeas with lime-cumin dressing. Simple, vegan, and ready in 10 minutes.

pages.title: Classic Creamy Chicken Salad
pages.description: Shredded chicken with Greek yogurt, mayo, celery, and Dijon. Perfect for sandwiches or lettuce wraps.

pages.title: Weight-Loss Cucumber Spinach Salad
pages.description: Light spinach and cucumber salad with apple cider vinegar dressing. Under 180 calories—ideal for low-calorie days.

pages.title: Mediterranean Quinoa Salad
pages.description: Fluffy quinoa with cucumber, tomatoes, olives, and feta. A satisfying 14g protein bowl with Mediterranean flair.
